name: academic-research-suite
runtime_notes: Install with scripts/install-codex-skill.ps1 or scripts/install-codex-skill.sh so the ARS source folders are copied into ars/.
Codex does not register Claude slash commands; use plain aliases such as ars-plan, ars-outline, and ars-full.
Do not spawn subagents automatically unless the user explicitly asks for parallel delegation.
